headline: RTX Outperforms Industry in the Past Year: Should You Buy?
summary: RTX shares surge 62.5% in the past year as defense contracts, new production investments and rising earnings expectations support long-term growth.

raw.headline: RTX Outperforms Industry in the Past Year: Should You Buy?
raw.summary: RTX shares surge 62.5% in the past year as defense contracts, new production investments and rising earnings expectations support long-term growth.

headline: Russia told Trump it has not shared intelligence with Iran during war, Witkoff says
summary: U.S. officials have said Russia has given Iran information that could help its forces strike U.S. military assets in the Middle East, MS Now has reported.

raw.headline: Russia told Trump it has not shared intelligence with Iran during war, Witkoff says
